series_metadata.series_description: This record contains cards that are sent in to the Ohio Department of Health to report the incidences of communicable diseases in the State of Ohio. The record is confidential because it contains the names, diagnosis, addresses and other personal informa

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded. This record is continually updated and purged ; Paper: Destroy after tabulating and entering information into the database, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
